recommendations.title: Yesterday, Today and Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: Three tales of very different women using their sexuality as a means to getting what they want.

recommendations.title: Rocco and His Brothers
recommendations.overview: When a impoverished widow’s family moves to the big city, two of her five sons become romantic rivals with deadly results.

recommendations.title: The Innocent
recommendations.overview: Tullio Hermil is a chauvinist aristocrat who flaunts his mistress to his wife, but when he believes she has been unfaithful he becomes enamored of her again.

recommendations.title: Le Notti Bianche
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man meets a young woman who is waiting on a canal bridge for her lover's return.

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: Gino, a drifter, begins an affair with inn-owner Giovanna as they plan to get rid of her older husband.

recommendations.title: My Friends
recommendations.overview: Four inseparable friends try to face their midlife crisis with daytrips and pranks at the expense of their families and the people around them.

recommendations.title: The Girl with a Pistol
recommendations.overview: A Sicilian woman is dishonored by her lover, then goes to London with a pistol intending to murder him.

recommendations.title: La Dolce Vita
recommendations.overview: Episodic journey of journalist Marcello who struggles to find his place in the world, torn between the allure of Rome's elite social scene and the stifling domesticity offered by his girlfriend, all the while searching for a way to become a serious w

recommendations.title: La Terra Trema
recommendations.overview: In rural Sicily, the fishermen live at the mercy of the greedy wholesalers. One family risks everything to buy their own boat and operate independently.

recommendations.title: Dearest Relatives, Poisonous Relations
recommendations.overview: During the annual Christmas gathering at the family home, the parents surprise their children by announcing their decision to move in with one of them and pass on the house.
